title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
